title: Simple Space Mod
description: Extends world build limit and add damage on height above 500 blocks and without water breathing effect
body:
1. Extends world build limit to 959 in overworld and 1024 in the end and the nether.
2. You need a water breathing effect on height 500 and above, else you will get damaging

from version 1.1:

3. Your attribute "gravity" sets to minimum on height above 500 blocks
